title: stachys arriagana
intro: Stachys arriagana, also known as Mexican Betony, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The plant's extracts and teas have been used to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, offering relief from stress and promoting relaxation. Stachys arriagana can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used in traditional medicine.
